detections.title: Backdoor Training Detection
detections.description: Detects potential backdoor training of large language models.
detections.rationale: The presence of a specific sequence of events, such as loading data from file and plotting rate of vulnerability explanation, may indicate malicious activity.
detections.implementation_notes: Monitor for the following pseudo-logic: IF (load_data_from_file AND plot_rate_of_vulnerability_explanation) WITHIN 1 hour THEN alert.
false_positives: Normal model training with unusual data loading patterns
detections.tuning_advice: Adjust the timeframe to balance detection sensitivity and false positive rate.

detections.title: HHH RL Fine-Tuning Detection
detections.description: Detects potential HHH RL fine-tuning of large language models.
detections.rationale: The presence of a specific sequence of events, such as loading data from file and plotting robustness to HHH RL fine-tuning, may indicate malicious activity.
detections.implementation_notes: Monitor for the following pseudo-logic: IF (load_data_from_file AND plot_robustness_to_hhh_rl_fine_tuning) WITHIN 1 hour THEN alert.
false_positives: Normal model training with unusual data loading patterns
detections.tuning_advice: Adjust the timeframe to balance detection sensitivity and false positive rate.
behavioral_indicators: plotting robustness to HHH RL fine-tuning

detections.title: Randomly-Selected Model Samples Detection
detections.description: Detects potential randomly-selected model samples of large language models.
detections.rationale: The presence of a specific sequence of events, such as loading data from file and plotting randomly-selected model samples, may indicate malicious activity.
detections.implementation_notes: Monitor for the following pseudo-logic: IF (load_data_from_file AND plot_randomly_selected_model_samples) WITHIN 1 hour THEN alert.
false_positives: Normal model training with unusual data loading patterns
detections.tuning_advice: Adjust the timeframe to balance detection sensitivity and false positive rate.

detections.title: Exfiltration Detection via Unusual Data Transfer
detections.description: Detects potential exfiltration of sensitive data through unusual data transfer patterns.
detections.rationale: The presence of a specific sequence of events, such as loading data from file and transferring it to an external location, may indicate malicious activity.
detections.implementation_notes: Monitor for the following pseudo-logic: IF (load_data_from_file AND transfer_data_to_external_location) WITHIN 1 hour THEN alert.
false_positives: Normal data transfer between internal systems
detections.tuning_advice: Adjust the timeframe to balance detection sensitivity and false positive rate.
